content: Decomposing into a single developer node that writes Sub plus its unit test.

function.name: decompose_task
function.arguments: {"goal":"Implement Sub function in pkg/math with a passing unit test","nodes":[{"id":"implement-sub","prompt":"Add a Sub function to pkg/math that returns the difference of two integers. Write pkg/math/sub.go with `package math` and a `func Sub(a, b int) int { return a - b }` exported function with GoDoc. Write pkg/math/sub_test.go with `package math`, `import \"testing\"`, and a `TestSub` that calls Sub(5, 3) and asserts the result is 2. Run `go test ./...` to confirm both TestAdd and TestSub pass before submitting.","role":"developer","depends_on":[],"file_scope":["pkg/math/sub.go","pkg/math/sub_test.go"]}]}
